scripts.setup: pnpm install && { git -C "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH" fetch --prune origin && git -C "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH" pull --ff-only || true; } && { [ -f apps/web/.env ] || cp "$CONDUCTOR_ROOT_PATH/apps/web/.env" apps/web/.env || echo 'WARN: apps/web/.env missing in the root repo — create it from apps/web/.env.example or the web app will fail env validation'; }
